name: Couscous Des Legumes
recipeIngredient: 1 small Sweet potato, peeled, cut into 1 or 2-inch chunks
1 small Carrot, peeled, cut into 1/2 -inch slices
1 medium Or 2 smallish new potatoes, cut into chunks
1 small To medium Turnip, peeled, cut into 1-inch chunks
1/2 Head Green Cabbage, cut into chunks
Trimmed and cut into 2-inch lengths or 1/2 cup frozen Green Beans
2 Zucchini, trimmed, cut into 3/4 -inch slices or chunks
1 Green Pepper, stemmed, seeded, cut into strips
1 to 2 tablespoons Orange flower or Rose water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until softened.
2. Stir in spices and cook for a few moments to bring out the flavors.
3. Add tomatoes, broth, sweet potato, carrot, and potatoes. Simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Add remaining vegetables and simmer another 15 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
5. Add chick-peas and remove from heat.
6. Combine couscous and raisins in a large bowl or saucepan.
7. Remove 2 cups of the broth from the vegetable stew and bring to a boil.
8. Pour it over the couscous and raisins, cover, and let stand for 10 minutes.
9. Add butter and fluff with a fork.
10. To serve: Mound couscous on a platter, sprinkle with orange flower or rose water, and ladle vegetables and broth. Serve immediately.
11. Serves 6.
